content.en:
Cultivating to break through to the peak of the fourth realm, and the extra-dimensional rules reached 70,000, Ye Tian was now completely able to impact the fifth realm.

However, he still had to wait, he wanted to break through to the tenth level of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate.

If he broke into the tenth day level, he might be able to obtain all the inheritance resources of that Heavenly Dimension Realm Lord, what a fortune it was!

Moreover, although the Heavenly Dimension Realm Lord was only the fifth realm, not the sixth realm, his strength was no less than that of the ordinary sixth realm.

After all, the Heavenly Dimension Realm Lord was the only one recorded in this territory that could be called the invincible existence of the Fifth Realm, and the wealth he left behind was definitely no less than all the wealth of the ordinary Sixth Realm.

Any inheritance place of the Wumu Realm Lord has a large amount of wealth and treasures, so the wealth of the Tianwei Realm Lord is equal to all the resources of the entire inheritance place of the Wumu Realm Lord.

Therefore, it is impossible for him to give up this opportunity in "157".

"Breaking through to the fifth realm will not solve the problem, and it may not be able to survive the multidimensional tribulation of death. But if you obtain the inheritance of the Heavenly Dimensional Realm Lord, then you will have the hope of surviving the multidimensional tribulation of death and even protecting the human race. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Now, he felt that his Four Realms Supreme Peerless Realm was about to be created.

Time flies.

Another 50,000 extradimensional epochs have passed.

Now, the news of the Death Multidimensional Tribulation has even spread loudly, and many small forces know about it, and they are terrified one by one, which has also made the 4000 Territory extremely chaotic.

After all, many living beings know that they are going to die, so they are naturally extremely crazy.

As a result, there was killing everywhere here, and there were even many extreme Fourth Realms plundering all resources, just to give themselves a glimmer of hope for impacting the Fifth Realm.

Ye Tian didn't care about these things, he practiced with peace of mind, trying to create his own supreme mastery of the Four Realms.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian smiled in the inheritance land of the Wumu Realm Lord.

"Hahaha, I have finally created the Supreme Peerless Learning of the Four Realms!"

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian condensed a wisp of sword light, tearing through this piece of void and piercing through the tenth dimension, and the terrifying power seemed to be able to slash a fifth realm.

And after creating the Four Realms Supreme Peerless Learning, his body seemed to have undergone some kind of transformation, and the three innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies had a tendency to merge.

It was a long time before the transformation was complete, and he felt even stronger.

However, he felt that he was still a little short of making it past the tenth hurdle.

Ye Tian named this supreme mastery of the Four Realms as the Multidimensional Sword Blade!

"The Supreme Peerless Sect of the Four Realms has been created, and the reward should appear!"

Wow!

The projection of the six treasures appeared, allowing Ye Tian to choose.

Although there are few types of treasures, each one is enough for the Fifth Realm to desperately kill and snatch.

Ye Tian carefully read the introduction of the six treasures, and after careful consideration, he decided to choose one of the treasures.

【Heavenly Black Hitomi】

This is an eye of a mysterious sixth realm multi-dimensional life, and if you fuse this eye, you can get a glimpse of the essence of the extradimensional rules.

However, the side effects are extremely great, once fused, it will gradually be affected by the power of the Tianwu pupil, and gradually assimilate into the Tianwu clan, and even the consciousness will be transformed, and only a very few treasures can suppress this assimilation.

However, once the Heavenly Black Pupil is used, many extradimensional realms will gradually become addicted to it, and they will not be able to get rid of it at all.

However, I have to admit that the value of Tianwu Hitomi is absolutely unimaginable.

"Just choose the Heavenly Black Pupil, the multi-dimensional scale will not help me much, even if I comprehend millions and tens of millions of extra-dimensional eras, at most I will raise the super-dimensional rules to the level of ninety thousand Dao, which is still a little worse. "

Thereupon.

Ye Tian chose Tianwu Pupil.

Wow!

A huge golden pupil appeared in front of Ye Tian and was put away by him.

At this point, this assessment is over.

Subsequently.

He left here, and as for the harvest this time, it was impossible for him to give the Wind and Rain Scattered Cultivation Alliance.

Of course, he will provide some resources to the Wind and Rain Scattered Cultivation Alliance.

And after many of the Fourth Realms of the Wind and Rain Scattered Cultivation Alliance knew the difficulty of the test, they gave up one by one.

Therefore, they didn't dare to hope for the inheritance of the Wumu Realm Lord.

......

"The effect of the Heavenly Black Pupil is really terrifying!"

Ye Tian's eyebrows were inlaid with a heavenly black pupil, and the extradimensional rules between heaven and earth could no longer be hidden, as if all the rules were under his observation.......

At the same time, the power of the Heavenly Black Pupil continued to affect him, and he also tried to assimilate his other bodies, but they were all blocked by the Great Realm Armor Technique, but they were almost unable to stop him.

It can be seen from this that the strength of the master of the Heavenly Black Pupil should be above that fallen Sixth Realm multidimensional life.

Enlightenment!

Enlightenment!

Enlightenment again!

Ye Tian sacrificed a copy body every once in a while, and with the help of the Heavenly Black Pupil, his extra-dimensional rule realm skyrocketed rapidly.

80,000 extra-dimensional rules!

Eighty-five thousand extradimensional rules!

Ninety thousand extra-dimensional rules!

In the blink of an eye, 300,000 extradimensional years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's realm of extradimensional rules had reached ninety-nine thousand nine hundred and ninety-nine extradimensional rules, and this last superdimensional rule was extremely difficult to comprehend.

In other fourth realms, it is difficult to break through a few more multi-dimensional tribulation years.

But Ye Tian relied on the Heavenly Black Pupil, Multi-Dimensional Wisdom Light, and Multi-Dimensional Yanbao Mirror, grinding hard, and finally comprehended the last extradimensional rule.

Rumble!!!!!

100,000 extra-dimensional rules erupted, surrounding Ye Tian, gradually merging and transforming.

This is an unimaginable transformation, a real qualitative change.

With each passing moment, his aura intensified.

I don't know how long it has been, but the 100,000 extra-dimensional rules have finally completed the final qualitative change, turning into a 5.3 dimensional dimension on Ye Tian's body.

"100,000 extra-dimensional rules can be turned into a set of dimensional rules, and the fifth realm that has mastered a one-dimensional rule is the truly top-notch fifth realm. With a single thought, you can dimensionalize an area, and with a single thought, you can wipe out all living beings in this dimension!"

After mastering the rules of one dimension, Ye Tiancai knew how powerful his strength was, and finally knew that the combat power of the tenth day level far surpassed that of the ninth day level, and he could almost kill in seconds.

"The supreme mastery of the four realms with the rules of one dimension, this is the real big killer, if I break through to the fifth realm again, even if I can't be invincible in the fifth realm, it is enough to sweep more than ninety percent of the fifth realm!"

Ye Tian was very excited, he finally saw a glimmer of hope for surviving the multi-dimensional tribulation of death.

Next, he is going to break through the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower and break through the tenth level in one go.
